shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: Tactile elevation for default task cards.

shadows.name: sketchbook
shadows.purpose: Solid offset shadow for focal illustration containers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action button for primary paths.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #275c40; color: #ffffff; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1c4530; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #112d1f; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Neutral outlined button for general actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #ffffff; color: #2c2922; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e5dfd3; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #faf9f5; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: #e5dfd3; }

components.name: Input Field
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 32px; background: #ffffff; color: #2c2922; border: 1px solid #c7bfad; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 10px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input:hover { background: #faf9f5; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #337050; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #337050; }

components.name: Task Card
components.description: Standard board card container for tasks.
components.html:
Task Title

Description of the task to be done.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5dfd3; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(24, 23, 19, 0.06); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px 0; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #2c2922; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 12px; color: #5d5646; }

narrative.overview: The DevSync design system balances a whimsical, warm forest-inspired aesthetic with the clean grids and lightweight utility of a high-performance developer workspace. It bridges the organic feel of nature with the functional focus required for task management.
keyCharacteristics: Warm Linen Base: Off-white textured tones that prevent screen fatigue.
Tactile Borders: Thin, crisp borders defining components without heavy fills.
Whimsical Accents: Organic icons, warm gold warnings, and round friendly details.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The Forest Green accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity makes interactive buttons stand out instantly.

rules.name: The Text-Wrap Rule
rules.body: All display and headline text blocks must use text-wrap: balance to maintain pleasant, even line breaks without orphans.

rules.name: The Border-Only Rule
rules.body: Surface distinction is established using the Stone Border color (#e5dfd3) instead of deep dimensional shadows.

dos: Do keep elements flat with a crisp 1px border (#e5dfd3) rather than deep, dark drop-shadows.
Do pair the playful squirrel doodle visuals with highly structured, aligned layouts so the app feels clean and put-together.
Do ensure text on Linen Cream meets contrast ratios of ≥4.5:1.
donts: Don't use standard sterile SaaS blues and cold corporate grays.
Don't use busy gradient-text headings or tiny tracked uppercase eyebrows.
Don't add side-stripe color bars larger than 1px to indicate task priority or status.
